PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Catherine Yee, via ZOOM, for Dean Hedani, via ZOOOM, Executor.

Ms. Yee reports that the Hong Kong administration has not concluded but that she has information that she needs to likely close the estate within the next two months and asks for her client to be reinstated as Executor, to close the matter. Ms. Yee confirms that the 144 shares are the only remaining asset of the estate. The court reminds Mr. Hedani of his responsibilities as Executor of the estate. The court reinstates Mr. Hedani as Executor of the estate, in open court.

The Accounting Status Petition is submitted. A Status on Close of Estate is set for Mar-15-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-21-2020 Continued To Nov-18-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Catherine Yee appeared by telephone for Dean Hedani (Petitioner).

The Court noted that there was no appearance at the September hearing and that the order appear was also sent to Mr. Hedani. Ms. Yee apologized to the Court stating that she thought she had calendared it, that she does not know why it did not get on her calendar, that Mr. Hedani has a medical issue, and that he has a medical appointment and could not appear today. Ms. Yee also stated that in March the Hong Kong Counsel (Mr. Mack) got a hold of the lacquer company, that because of the pandemic Mr. Mack did not hear from Counsel for the lacquer company, that there is a deadline of October 27th to reply, that they have some papers and requested an eight-week continuance to have final distribution completed. The Court stated that it is concerned about the administration of the estate and that if Mr. Hedani is not able to make it to Court, he may not be able to serve as the Executor. Status on close of estate is continued to November 18, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-21-2020 Off Calendar

The status hearing is also continued to that date. One of the above mentioned petitions must be filed one week prior.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-10-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Catherine Yee for Petitioner.

Ms. Yee submits a courtesy copy of the amended petition filed on Dec. 13, 2019 in open court. The Court notes there is no proposed order.

The Petition for Approval of Third Report of Status of Administration is taken under submission. Ms. Yee is instructed to deliver a proposed order to dept 202 by 2pm tomorrow.

Judge: Joeseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Continued To Feb-03-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Catherine Yee for Dean Hedani (Executor).

Ms. Yee stated that she does not have a signed verification, that there is an issue with the notice of hearing and proof of service, and requested a continuance. Ms. Yee also stated that there are no assets in the US, that there are only shares of stock in Hong Kong, that they have to keep this estate open, and that the Hong Kong case is moving forward and should conclude within a month. In addition, Ms. Yee stated that the difference between this petition and the amended petition is that they had contact with Hong Kong, that it is noted in paragraph 11 of the amended petition, suggested proceeding with the amended petition, stated that she will get the verification right away as well as the notice of hearing and proof of service. The Petition for Approval of Third Report on Status of Administration is continued to February 3, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Yee is to file her documents by January 27, 2020.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Trausch. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition To Terminate Probate
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Continued To Jan-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Catherine Yee for Dean Hedani (Petitioner).

Ms. Yee requested a continuance stating that she has been unable to get any answers from the Hong Kong Attorney regarding the stocks and that she can not file an inventory. The Court informed Ms. Yee that she still has to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Status on close of estate is continued to January 28, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition To Terminate Probate
Off Calendar Jul-23-2018 Continued To Dec-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Catherine Yee for Dean Hedani (Petitioner).

Ms. Yee stated that there are no assets in the San Francisco probate, that there is however a probate in Hong Kong, that the Decedent owns stock in a paint company, that she was hoping to have the San Francisco case extended for six months and that probate was opened in San Francisco to get the Decedent's Husband appointed. The Court informed Ms. Yee that she can still file an inventory and appraisal to set out the estimated value of the stocks. Ms. Yee stated that her Client is trying to communicate with his Counsel in Hong Kong for status, but he has not heard back, and that her Client is in the process of substituting Counsel. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition to terminate probate is continued to December 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
